The agent misinterpreted the problem, applying the same 40% increase to both salaries instead of accounting for simultaneous growth and the relative percentage relationship after the increase.
The agent misinterpreted the required fabric dimensions, adding extra 2 ft twice instead of only once per side, leading to an incorrect area calculation.
The agent used compounding depreciation instead of the required linear depreciation, indicating a flawed overall strategy.
